rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE CAROL H. ELVIN TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Compliance With Deposition Subpoena
rulings.Rulings: Petitioner's Motion To Compel Compliance With Deposition Subpoena is granted in part and off calendar in part. The motion is granted as to San Francisco Department of Human Services. The motion is off calendar as to Sonoma County Human Services Deparment. The motion was not timely filed for this date. The motion was not filed and served 16 court days prior to the hearing. Additionally, there is no showing that there is a written agreement to accept service by facsimile with the Sonoma County Human Services Deparment as required by CRC 2008(b). (612/HEWLETT)
